_comment: Name -> frame-index map for the Kenney 'Roguelike Indoor' pack (indoor.png, CC0). Phaser loads this sheet as a spritesheet; the frame index below is what you pass to scene.add.image(x, y, 'in', <index>). See indoor-tilemap-reference.png for a labelled grid of every tile.

sheet.indexing: index = row * 27 + col ; pixelX = col*(16+1) ; pixelY = row*(16+1). NOTE: 27 columns, not 26 — the 1px spacing changes the column count. Getting this wrong shifts every index and picks the wrong tile.

verified: Furniture/floor/plant/appliance/bookshelf entries visually confirmed against the pixel art. Decorative extras (candelabra, torch, clothesline, piano) identified from the reference grid but less critical.
